description:
This Andamooka Opal parcel has a beautiful spectrum of colour. The pieces measures 6 x 6 x 2/3 mm and would make unique rings, necklaces or collector’s pieces. Andamooka Opal’s base rock is limestone, making the opal a similar composition to that of boulder opal making the colour stand out strongly with bright hues of purple, orange, yellow and blue standing out most prominently.

Inclusions: the treatment has been worked from on the sides of the opal, so they will need to be bezel set.
title: Treated Andamooka Matrix Opal Parcel

description:
This Andamooka Opal Parcel has a beautiful spectrum of colour. The pieces measure 11 x 9.5 x 2.8 mm, 11.5 x 5 x 3.5 and 8 x 5 x 3 mm. This parcel would make unique rings, necklaces or collector’s pieces. Andamooka Opal’s base rock is limestone, making the opal a similar composition to that of boulder opal; whilst the colour is thin the base rock is strong.

This piece has been semi polished, the face left in a semi natural state with only parts of the face smoothed out to a fine polish to preserve as much colour as possible.

Inclusions: natural fractures and sand spots as seen in the product image.
title: Andamooka Opal Parcel 6 cts

1x Lightning Ridge Black Opal weighing 1.25 cts that would look lovely set in a pendant, ring, or could make a beautiful collector’s piece. This piece has great brightness and a broad flash of colour most of the stone with a few spots of black potch as seen in the product picture.

1x 0.90 ct lightning ridge black opal, blue, purple and green colouring, with potch in the face but great brightness.

Priced in AUD

All images and videos are taken under white light to provide the best real-life presentation of the opal and are not edited or misleading.

If you have any queries regarding the item, please fill out the form below and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

title: Lightning Ridge Black Opal Parcel

description:
This Lightning Ridge Semi Black Opal weighs 5.50 cts and would make a beautiful ring stone, collector’s piece or pendant. This piece has good brightness and a Flagstone pattern across the entire face. Inclusions are: natural webbing and a sand spot.

This opal is free form but can be reshaped into an oval free of charge if desired, which would also remove the sand spot but reduce overall carat weight.

Please note:

Priced in AUD

All images and videos are taken under white light to provide the best real-life presentation of the opal and are not edited or misleading.

title: Lightning Ridge Black Opal 1.45 cts

description:
This Lightning Ridge Black Opal weighs 6.3 ct and would look lovely as a necklace piece or collector’s piece. This piece has a rare flagstone pattern, good brightness and bright hues of green and red across the stone’s face over a black background.

The webbing and colouring of this piece was the inspiration behind the ‘leaf’ cut of the opal and helped to accentuate the rare colouring and pattern of the gem. Truely a one of a kind gem, that you are unlikely to find anything similar to.

Please note:

Priced in AUD

All images and videos are taken under white light to provide the best real-life presentation of the opal and are not edited or misleading.

If you have any queries regarding the item, please fill out the form below and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
